title: Regolamenti dwar Supervisory Consolidation Imħassrin bl-Avviż Legali 494 tal-2021
title_en: Regolamenti dwar Supervisory Consolidation Imħassrin bl-Avviż Legali 494 tal-2021
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/371.15/mlt, expression eli/sl/371.15/20220201/mlt).

provisions.title: Full text
provisions.content:
SUPERVISORY CONSOLIDATION

[L.S.371.15

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 371.15
REGOLAMENTI DWAR SUPERVISORY
CONSOLIDATION*
10 ta’ April, 2015
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 31 tal-2014, kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 75 tal-2019.
Imħassrin bl-Avviż Legali 494 tal-2021.

*Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

1
